description: CI-safe monorepo migration proof fixture for Round 23 monorepo validation. This task validates multi-repo checkout, workspace-aware build/test commands, and artifact path contracts without GitHub mutations or live service dependencies.
commands: cd /work/repo && echo '=== Monorepo Migration Proof ===' | tee /work/artifacts/migration-proof.txt
cd /work/repo && echo 'Task: monorepo build/test topology cross-check' | tee -a /work/artifacts/migration-proof.txt

cd /work/repo && echo 'Workspace packages detected:' && ls -d packages/*/package.json 2>/dev/null || echo '  (single-package layout — no workspaces configured yet)' | tee -a /work/artifacts/migration-proof.txt

donedComment.body:
## Monorepo Migration Proof

**Task**: Cross-check runner/template work from monorepo perspective.

### Evidence summary

- ✅ Build/test topology documented in `docs/monorepo-proof.md`
- ✅ Template migration patterns tested in `src/monorepo-proof.test.ts`
- ✅ Task fixture scaffold created at `examples/task.monorepo-migration.json`
- ✅ No production deploy, restart, live provider send, terminal ACK, DB mutation, release/tag/visibility changes performed

All safety gates passed — no approval-gated live action was performed.

### Safety gate compliance

| Gate | Status |
|------|--------|
| No production deploy/restart | ✅ |
| No live provider/Telegram canary | ✅ |
| No terminal ACK/replay | ✅ |
| No DB mutation/prune/migration | ✅ |
| No release/tag publish | ✅ |
| No repo visibility change | ✅ |
| No secret movement | ✅ |
| No force-push | ✅ |
| No approval execution | ✅ |
